from __future__ import annotations
from typing import TYPE_CHECKING

if TYPE_CHECKING:
    from myapp.models import Order, OrderResult, OrderProcessor


def process(order: Order) -> OrderResult:
    from myapp.models import OrderProcessor
    processor = OrderProcessor()
    return processor.process(order)


def create_order(data: dict) -> Order:
    from myapp.models import Order
    return Order(id=data["id"], items=data["items"])


def process_and_get_result(order: Order) -> OrderResult:
    from myapp.models import OrderProcessor
    processor = OrderProcessor()
    return processor.process(order)
